programme.title: BKFC 54
programme.desc: Rosen Dimitrov vs. Todor Zhelyazkov, middleweight; Georgi Valentinov vs. Bojan Kosendar, middleweight. From Arena Sofia in Sofia, Bulgaria. From Nov. 17, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 27
programme.desc: From Aug. 20, 2022. Features Mike Perry vs. Michael Page, plus Connor Tierney vs. Joe Elmore in bare knuckle boxing action from London.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: SlapFight
programme.desc: The world's original slap competition league.

programme.title: SlapFIGHT Championship
programme.desc: The world's top slap fighters compete for the championship.

programme.desc: From May 17, 2024 at Accor Arena in Paris.

programme.desc: Main event: Valentin Moldavsky defeats Ante Delija.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: Hart v VanZant, Nguyen v Bedford, Leben v Henry & more battle in the history-making, first ever Knuckle Mania!

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania VI
programme.desc: Ben Rothwell vs. Andrei Arlovski, heavyweight title bout; Lorenzo Hunt vs. Yoel Romero, heavyweight.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night - Newcastle: Terrill vs. McFarlane
programme.desc: Mick Terrill vs. Ghost McFarlane, heavyweight title bout. From Newcastle, U.K.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 2
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Martin Brown for BKFC lightweight title, Chad Mendes vs. Joshuah Alvarez. Plus Mike Perry vs. Julian Lane in bare knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla. From Feb. 19, 2022.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 3
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Mike Richman, light heavyweight championship bout. From Feb. 17, 2023 at Tingly Coliseum in Albuquerque, N.M.

programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Eddie Alvarez, middleweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Maverik Center in Salt Lake City. From Dec. 2, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 53
programme.desc: From Colonial Life Arena, Columbia, S.C. on Nov. 3, 2023.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Liz Carmouche vs. Deanna Bennett, women's flyweight championship; Tim Johnson vs. Said Sowma, heavyweight bout. From April 21, 2023 at Neal S. Blaisdell Arena in Honolulu.

programme.desc: From Seneca Allegany Resort and Casino in Salamanca, New York.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Raufeon Stots vs. Patchy Mix, bantamweight World Grand Prix bout; Ilima-Lei MacFarlane vs. Kana Watanabe, women's flyweight bout. From April 22, 2023 at Neal S. Blaisdell Arena in Honolulu.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania IV
programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Thiago Alves, light heavyweight; Mick Terrill vs. Lorenzo Hunt, heavyweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Peacock Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: BKFC 50: Hunt vs. Camozzi
programme.desc: Lorenzo Hunt vs. Chris Camozzi, cruiserweight championship bout; Keegan Vandermeer vs. Tyler Winemiller; Andrew Yates vs. Christian Torres, welterweight. From 1st Bank Center in Denver.

programme.desc: Mick Terrill vs. Ghost McFarlane, heavyweight title bout. From Newcastle, U.K.

programme.desc: Features Christine Ferea vs. Taylor Starling for BKFC women's flyweight title, plus John Dodson vs. Ryan Benoit in bare knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico. From Aug. 27, 2022.

programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.
